'''dhoyadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yackety|yackety]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yackety|yackety]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhoyadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoyadithi|dhoyadithi]] || [[word:dhoyadiji|dhoyadiji]] || [[word:dhoyadishi|dhoyadishi]] || [[word:dhoyadiki|dhoyadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoyaduthuthu|dhoyaduthuthu]] || [[word:dhoyadujuju|dhoyadujuju]] || [[word:dhoyadushushu|dhoyadushushu]] || [[word:dhoyadukuku|dhoyadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoyaduthu|dhoyaduthu]] || [[word:dhoyaduju|dhoyaduju]] || [[word:dhoyadushu|dhoyadushu]] || [[word:dhoyaduku|dhoyaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoyadufthuf|dhoyadufthuf]] || [[word:dhoyadufjuf|dhoyadufjuf]] || [[word:dhoyadufshuf|dhoyadufshuf]] || [[word:dhoyadufkuf|dhoyadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoyadethe|dhoyadethe]] || [[word:dhoyadeje|dhoyadeje]] || [[word:dhoyadeshe|dhoyadeshe]] || [[word:dhoyadeke|dhoyadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoyadothotho|dhoyadothotho]] || [[word:dhoyadojojo|dhoyadojojo]] || [[word:dhoyadoshosho|dhoyadoshosho]] || [[word:dhoyadokoko|dhoyadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoyadotho|dhoyadotho]] || [[word:dhoyadojo|dhoyadojo]] || [[word:dhoyadosho|dhoyadosho]] || [[word:dhoyadoko|dhoyadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoyadofthof|dhoyadofthof]] || [[word:dhoyadofjof|dhoyadofjof]] || [[word:dhoyadofshof|dhoyadofshof]] || [[word:dhoyadofkof|dhoyadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻf|dhoyadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŠthĂŠ|dhoyadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŠjĂŠ|dhoyadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŠshĂŠ|dhoyadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhoyadĂŠkĂŠ|dhoyadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhoyadathatha|dhoyadathatha]] || [[word:dhoyadajaja|dhoyadajaja]] || [[word:dhoyadashasha|dhoyadashasha]] || [[word:dhoyadakaka|dhoyadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhoyadatha|dhoyadatha]] || [[word:dhoyadaja|dhoyadaja]] || [[word:dhoyadasha|dhoyadasha]] || [[word:dhoyadaka|dhoyadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhoyadafthaf|dhoyadafthaf]] || [[word:dhoyadafjaf|dhoyadafjaf]] || [[word:dhoyadafshaf|dhoyadafshaf]] || [[word:dhoyadafkaf|dhoyadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhoyadasha|dhoyadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoyadshĂ«sha|dhoyadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoyadrosha|dhoyadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoyadmusha|dhoyadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoyadyasha|dhoyadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoyadnkshĂ«sha|godhoyadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoyadnkrosha|godhoyadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoyadnkmusha|godhoyadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoyadnkyasha|godhoyadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhoyayadasha|dhoyayadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoyayadshĂ«sha|dhoyayadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoyayadrosha|dhoyayadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoyayadmusha|dhoyayadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoyayadyasha|dhoyayadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoyayadnkshĂ«sha|godhoyayadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoyayadnkrosha|godhoyayadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoyayadnkmusha|godhoyayadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoyayadnkyasha|godhoyayadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dheyĂŠdasha|dheyĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dheyĂŠdshĂ«sha|dheyĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dheyĂŠdrosha|dheyĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dheyĂŠdmusha|dheyĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dheyĂŠdyasha|dheyĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godheyĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|godheyĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godheyĂŠdnkrosha|godheyĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godheyĂŠdnkmusha|godheyĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godheyĂŠdnkyasha|godheyĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhoyfadasha|dhoyfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhoyfadshĂ«sha|dhoyfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhoyfadrosha|dhoyfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhoyfadmusha|dhoyfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhoyfadyasha|dhoyfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhoyfadnkshĂ«sha|godhoyfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhoyfadnkrosha|godhoyfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhoyfadnkmusha|godhoyfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhoyfadnkyasha|godhoyfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
